sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Univest Financial Corporation Files Form 8-K Current Report with SEC on April 23, 2026 17
feed.summary: Univest Financial Corporation (UVSP) filed an 8-K current report with the SEC detailing the results of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders held on April 23, 2026. Key outcomes included the election of four Class III Directors, the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent auditor, and advisory approval of executive compensation. The company reported strong shareholder support for all proposals, indicating governance stability and no significant contentious issues.

feed.title: Capital One customers seek class certification over data disclosure to Meta, Google
feed.summary: Capital One customers are seeking class certification in a lawsuit alleging the financial institution illegally shared their personal and financial information with Meta Platforms, Google, and other third parties. They claim Capital One installed third-party tracking tools on its website without consent, leading to targeted advertisements after applying for credit cards. Capital One disputes the class certification, citing significant differences among proposed class members.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare announced its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with revenues increasing 4.3% to $19.109 billion and diluted EPS rising 10.9% to $7.15. The company repurchased $1.571 billion of its common stock and declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.78 per share. Despite a dynamic environment and lower respiratory-related admissions, HCA Healthcare reaffirmed its 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Better International ETF: iShares' IEMG vs. State Street's SPGM
feed.summary: This article compares two international ETFs: State Street SPDR Portfolio MSCI Global Stock Market ETF (SPGM) and iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (IEMG). It highlights their differences in geographic focus, sector exposure, and risk profiles, despite sharing the same low expense ratio. The comparison delves into their cost, performance, risk, and portfolio composition to help investors choose based on their strategies.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson to acquire AtraVerse Medical and its transseptal access system
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson announced its definitive agreement to acquire Atraverse Medical, the developer of the Hotwire transseptal access system. This acquisition aims to strengthen J&J's cardiac ablation solutions portfolio. The Hotwire system, invented by Steven Mickelsen, has already been used in over 3,000 clinical procedures and is expected to close in Q2 2026.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Northern Trust beats Q1 2026 expectations with strong EPS
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corporation reported strong Q1 2026 results, surpassing analyst expectations with an EPS of $2.71 and revenue of $2.21 billion, leading to a stock price increase. The company highlighted robust organic growth in all business segments, effective management strategies, and a focus on AI integration and product innovation for future growth. Executives discussed capital management, credit quality, and strategic investments in wealth management talent and digital channels.

feed.title: Amcor opens advanced healthcare packaging coating facility in Malaysia
feed.summary: Amcor has opened a new $35 million advanced healthcare packaging coating facility in Subang Jaya, Malaysia, significantly expanding its manufacturing presence in Southeast Asia. This facility introduces air-knife coating technology to the region for sterile medical device packaging, strengthening the local supply chain and supporting Malaysia's advanced manufacturing goals. The investment reinforces Malaysia's position as a hub for healthcare packaging and demonstrates Amcor's commitment to the Asia Pacific market.

feed.title: Malaysia adds $35M sterile packaging site as Amcor localizes supply
feed.summary: Amcor (NYSE: AMCR) has opened a new advanced healthcare packaging coating facility in Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia, representing an investment of over $35 million. This facility introduces air-knife coating technology for sterile medical paper and aims to localize supply chains, enhance pilot-to-production scale-up, and bolster regional healthcare manufacturing. The Malaysian Investment Development Authority facilitated the project, which supports Malaysia's goal of becoming a regional hub for healthcare packaging.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Molina Healthcare to $180 From $151, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Molina Healthcare (MOH) to $180 from $151, while choosing to maintain a "Neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation for the managed healthcare provider. The article also notes that Deutsche Bank similarly adjusted its price target for Molina Healthcare earlier the same day.

feed.title: TSMC Stock Surges to Record. Here’s Why.
feed.summary: TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing) stock surged on Friday, hitting a record high. The rally was primarily driven by actions from Taiwanese regulators. American investors, however, may not fully benefit from this surge.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group stock hits all-time high at 101.0 USD
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (PFG) stock has reached an all-time high of $101.0, reflecting a 34% increase over the past year and strong investor confidence. The company also surpassed analyst expectations in its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings, reporting higher EPS and revenue, and manages $770.2 billion in assets as of March 31, 2026. Despite trading above its Fair Value, PFG offers a 3.3% dividend yield and has consistently raised its dividend for 17 consecutive years.

feed.title: Trio-Tech International raises $10M in registered direct offering
feed.summary: Trio-Tech International is conducting a registered direct offering to raise approximately $10 million by selling 1,052,632 shares of common stock to institutional investors. The company intends to use the net proceeds for working capital, general corporate purposes, and strategic investments, particularly in the AI and automotive markets. This offering follows a significant 432% surge in its stock price over the past year, despite an InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock may be overvalued relative to its fair value.

feed.title: Teradyne stock hits all-time high at 410.0 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc.'s stock reached an all-time high of $410.83, a 421% appreciation over the past year, bringing its market capitalization to $62.8 billion. This surge reflects strong investor confidence despite a high P/E ratio suggesting potential overvaluation according to InvestingPro. The company's recent activities include a raised price target from Morgan Stanley, strategic acquisitions, successful legal action, and the launch of new test platforms, all contributing to its unprecedented growth.

feed.title: Equinix stock hits all-time high, reaching 1126.13 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Equinix Inc. (EQIX) stock has hit an all-time high of $1,126.13, reflecting a robust 34.2% increase over the past year and a 46.36% year-to-date return. Despite this strong performance, an InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock might be overvalued relative to its Fair Value. The company has also been active with new initiatives, including the launch of Equinix Fabric Intelligence, an AI-powered platform, and the global expansion of its Pathways to Tech program, alongside positive analyst ratings.

feed.title: Newmont beats quarterly profit estimates on strong gold prices
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation exceeded first-quarter profit and free cash flow estimates, driven by strong gold prices, increased production, and reduced costs. The company also announced a new $6 billion share repurchase authorization, signaling confidence in its cash generation. Despite potential higher costs in the second quarter due to increased spending and royalties, Newmont maintained its full-year gold production and cost guidance.

feed.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd Stock (TSM) Opened Up by 3.21% on Apr 24: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co Ltd (TSM) stock surged by 3.21% on April 24, driven by strong Q1 2026 financial results with an optimistic revenue growth projection of over 30% for 2026, primarily fueled by AI demand. Regulatory changes in Taiwan allowing increased domestic fund allocation to large-cap stocks like TSMC also contributed to the rise. Additionally, a favorable broader semiconductor industry outlook, characterized by robust demand and supply shortages, especially in AI-related applications, provides strong tailwinds for TSMC.

feed.title: Merck Announces Expiration of Hart-Scott-Rodino Act Waiting Period to Acquire Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
feed.summary: Merck announced the expiration of the Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Improvements Act waiting period, a key condition for its pending acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals. The acquisition involves a cash tender offer of $53.00 per share for Terns common stock. Consummation of the tender offer is still subject to other conditions, including the tender of over 50% of Terns' outstanding shares.

feed.title: PODD Downgraded by Rothschild & Co -- Price Target Lowered to $2
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co has downgraded Insulet Corporation (PODD) from Buy to Neutral, significantly lowering the price target from $380.00 to $220.00, a 42.11% decrease. Despite the downgrade, GuruFocus indicates that PODD is currently 50.2% undervalued with a strong GF Score of 85/100, while insider activity shows $1.5 million in share purchases over the last three months. Investors are advised to proceed with caution due to the analyst's reassessment of growth potential and market conditions.

feed.title: ALGN Maintained by Morgan Stanley -- Price Target Raised to $188
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has maintained an Equal-Weight rating for Align Technology (ALGN) and raised its price target from $169.00 to $188.00, reflecting cautious optimism and growth potential. The stock is considered approximately 24.0% undervalued according to GF Value™ and holds a strong GF Score™ of 94/100, indicating good long-term return potential despite some insider selling activity.

feed.title: How Las Vegas Is Turning Savings and On Par Offers Into Demand
feed.summary: Las Vegas is implementing new strategies, including on-par currency offers and inclusive packages, to attract Canadian tourists. Circa Resort & Casino's on-par promotion has significantly increased Canadian bookings and visits. Other properties like MGM Resorts International are offering inclusive deals with diverse dining and entertainment options across their venues to appeal to budget-conscious travelers.

feed.title: Verizon earnings on deck: Can CEO turnaround deliver subscriber growth?
feed.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is set to report its first-quarter earnings, which analysts view as a critical assessment of the company's strategic turnaround under new CEO Dan Schulman. Investors are keen to see if Verizon can maintain subscriber growth momentum and demonstrate profitability through customer experience improvements rather than aggressive promotions. The report will also reveal whether the company's cost discipline and operational efficiencies are effectively driving EBITDA and free cash flow growth amidst competitive pressures.

feed.title: Craig-Hallum Sticks to Its Buy Rating for Axon Enterprise (AXON)
feed.summary: Craig-Hallum analyst Jeremy Hamblin has reiterated a Buy rating for Axon Enterprise (AXON) with a price target of $820.00. This comes despite negative insider sentiment, indicated by increased share selling in the past quarter, including a recent sale by Director Erika Nardini. Axon reported quarterly revenue of $796.72 million and a net profit of $3 million for the quarter ending December 31.

feed.title: Bio-Rad Laboratories, Inc. (BIO) PT Reduced to $300 by Citigroup Amid Process Chromatography Concerns
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its rating on Bio-Rad Laboratories (BIO) to Neutral and reduced its price target from $375 to $300, citing concerns over the company's process chromatography segment and diagnostic operations in China. Despite this, Bio-Rad recently expanded its portfolio of recombinant monoclonal anti-idiotypic antibodies, enhancing its capabilities in drug development and monitoring. The article suggests that while Bio-Rad has investment potential, other AI stocks may offer greater upside with less risk.

feed.title: Truist Securities Adjusts Price Target on First American Financial to $85 From $82, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for First American Financial (FAF) to $85 from $82, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes shortly before First American Financial's Q1 2026 earnings call, and follows other recent analyst upgrades for the company.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Consumer Cyclical Companies: Booking Holdings (BKNG) and Airbnb (ABNB)
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Brian Pitz reiterated a Buy rating on Booking Holdings (BKNG) with a price target of $248.00, noting a strong buy consensus among analysts with a 27.2% upside. Goldman Sachs analyst Eric Sheridan maintained a Hold rating on Airbnb (ABNB) with a price target of $150.00, indicating a moderate buy consensus with a 3.9% upside. These insights provide differing analyst perspectives on these two consumer cyclical companies.

feed.title: Guggenheim Starts Tyra Biosciences, Inc. (TYRA) at Buy on Strength of Lead Drug Dabogratinib
feed.summary: Guggenheim Securities has initiated coverage of Tyra Biosciences, Inc. (TYRA) with a Buy rating and a $54 price target, citing the therapeutic potential of its lead drug candidate, dabogratinib. The firm believes the drug could have significant upside if successful in various patient groups and disease areas. Furthermore, Tyra Biosciences recently appointed Habib Dable, a biopharmaceutical industry veteran, to its Board of Directors to help advance its FGFR3-targeted pipeline.

feed.title: Truist Securities Adjusts Price Target on Globe Life to $185 From $180, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Globe Life (GL) to $185 from $180, while reiterating a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial firm. The article also provides recent news about Globe Life's Q1 2026 earnings, which showed a rise in profit and revenue, leading to an increased profit guidance for the full year 2026.

feed.title: Truist Securities Adjusts Price Target on Prologis to $154 From $139, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Prologis to $154 from $139, while reiterating its Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the firm regarding Prologis's performance. The article also lists several other analyst rating updates for Prologis from various firms around the same period, predominantly maintaining Buy or Outperform ratings with increased price targets.

feed.title: Cummins Showcases Fire and Rescue Technologies at FDIC 2026
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. is presenting its latest drivetrain and engine innovations for fire and rescue professionals at FDIC International 2026. Key highlights include the new QuikDisc™ Rotor, which drastically reduces maintenance downtime for heavy fire apparatus, and the Cummins X10™ diesel engine designed for efficiency and performance in emergency vehicles. The company also introduces its EPA27 Twin Module Aftertreatment system, meeting stringent emissions standards while ensuring durability and flexible integration.

feed.title: Truist Securities Adjusts Price Target on Roper Technologies to $475 From $550, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Truist Securities has lowered its price target for Roper Technologies (ROP) to $475 from $550 but maintained a "Buy" rating. This adjustment comes amidst a flurry of analyst activity, with several other firms also updating their price targets and ratings for the company, reflecting a mixed but generally positive outlook. Roper Technologies recently reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, increased its 2026 profit forecast, and announced an increase in its equity buyback program, driven by strong AI demand boosting software sales.

feed.title: Chevron CEO Expects Air Travel To 'Get Worse' Over The Next Few Weeks As Hormuz Crisis Pushes Fuel Costs Higher
feed.summary: Chevron CEO Mike Wirth predicts a worsening situation for air travel in the coming weeks due to the Hormuz crisis, leading to higher fuel costs and reduced flight availability. He notes that the jet fuel market is tightening, particularly in Europe and Asia, and North American jet fuel prices have surged over 80% year-on-year. Wirth also highlighted that U.S. airlines are relatively better off than their European counterparts as the U.S. produces its own jet fuel.

feed.title: Strong director support at J.B. Hunt (NASDAQ: JBHT) 2026 vote
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. held its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on April 23, 2026, where all nominated directors were elected with strong shareholder support. In addition to director elections, two other proposals passed with significant majorities. The detailed voting results for each director nominee and proposal were disclosed in the company's 8-K filing.

feed.title: SLB to acquire S&P Global upstream software, advancing AI-driven subsurface strategy
feed.summary: SLB announced its acquisition of S&P Global's upstream geoscience and petroleum engineering software portfolio, aiming to enhance its digital subsurface capabilities and presence in U.S. unconventional workflows. This move will integrate S&P Global's software, widely used by onshore operators for planning and reservoir analysis, into SLB's digital platforms, including AI-enabled applications. The deal, expected to close in late 2026 or early 2027, also includes a collaboration to develop new AI models to improve subsurface analysis and planning.

feed.title: Monolithic Power Systems stock reaches all-time high at 1635.43 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) stock has hit an all-time high of $1,635.43, marking a 178.36% increase over the past year. The semiconductor company's market capitalization stands at $79.81 billion, and it reported strong Q4 2025 earnings and revenue, leading several analyst firms to raise their price targets. Despite being considered overvalued by some InvestingPro analysis, investor confidence in its growth and market position remains high.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. Investigated by the Portnoy Law Firm
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced an investigation into Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE: APD) for potential securities fraud. This follows a significant drop in Air Products' stock price on December 8, 2025, after the company disclosed advanced negotiations for a strategic consolidation with Yara International, raising concerns about integration risks and financial impact. The firm is encouraging investors to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Tompkins Financial Reports Q1 2026 Financial Results and Performance Highlights
feed.summary: Tompkins Financial Corporation announced record net income of $26.1 million for Q1 2026, marking a significant increase from the previous year. The company reported improved net interest margin, strengthened its balance sheet with total assets reaching $8.06 billion, and declared a cash dividend of $0.67 per common share. These strong results, coupled with stable credit quality, are expected to positively impact shareholder value and the company's stock price.

feed.title: Bernstein SocGen lowers Regeneron stock price target to $913
feed.summary: Bernstein SocGen Group has reduced its price target for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) to $913 from $921, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The stock is currently trading at $766.02, significantly below the updated target. Despite the lowered target, analysts still suggest the stock is undervalued according to InvestingPro, though 8 analysts have revised earnings downwards for the upcoming period.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Completes TELI Acquisition, Expands Telomir-1 Rights
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (TELO) has finalized its acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. on April 22, 2026, issuing 34,389,710 restricted common shares to former TELI shareholders. This acquisition, which included a $1 million contribution from Bayshore Trust with an option for an additional $4 million, consolidates all global rights to Telomir-1 under Telomir Pharmaceuticals. This move eliminates geographic fragmentation and provides unified control over the development and potential commercialization of Telomir-1 worldwide.

feed.title: Lam Research stock hits all-time high at 274.42 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Lam Research Corp's stock has reached an all-time high of $274.42, driven by robust performance and strong demand in the semiconductor equipment industry, with its stock surging by 262.03% over the past year. The company boasts a perfect Piotroski Score of 9 and has received multiple upward earnings revisions from analysts, reflecting strong investor confidence and positive future outlook. Recent fiscal third-quarter results exceeded estimates, and analysts from UBS, Stifel, TD Cowen, Cantor Fitzgerald, and RBC Capital have reiterated Buy/Overweight ratings and raised price targets, citing AI-driven growth and market share gains.

feed.title: Tompkins Financial raises quarterly dividend 7.5% to $0.67
feed.summary: Tompkins Financial Corporation (NYSE American: TMP) has announced a 7.5% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.67 per share, marking its 36th consecutive year of dividend increases. The dividend will be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 8, 2026. This news follows the company's strong fourth-quarter results, including net interest income surpassing expectations, and a recent price target increase by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods.

feed.title: Elevance Health Stock Rises on Q1 Beat and Guidance Raise: What’s Next?
feed.summary: Elevance Health (ELV) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, surpassing Wall Street expectations with adjusted diluted EPS of $12.58, significantly beating the $10.82 consensus. This outperformance led to a stock increase and a raised full-year 2026 adjusted diluted EPS guidance to at least $26.75, confirming 2026 as a trough year before a projected 12% EPS growth in 2027. Despite some ongoing challenges in Medicaid margins and a CMS accrual, analysts maintain a positive outlook, seeing the stock as undervalued given its recovery trajectory.

feed.title: World Investment Advisors Acquires 8,130 Shares of Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: World Investment Advisors increased its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 14.3%, acquiring an additional 8,130 shares to hold a total of 64,911 shares valued at $11.103 million. Qualcomm's board has authorized a $20 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.92 per share, reflecting confidence in the company. Despite insider selling, Qualcomm beat Q4 earnings estimates with $3.50 EPS on $12.25 billion revenue and provided strong Q2 guidance.

feed.title: News brief: AI woes continue for security leaders
feed.summary: A recent survey of CIOs reveals that nearly half wish AI had "never been invented" due to the significant risks it introduces, highlighting the complicated relationship between AI and security professionals. Organizations are rapidly adopting AI, but security teams struggle to manage the expanding attack surface and new vulnerabilities, making securing AI a top priority. This report compiles related news, including major banks addressing security concerns as they accelerate AI investments and AI agents amplifying existing vulnerabilities, underscoring AI's dual role as both a critical tool and a growing threat.

feed.title: Tuya Smart Unveils Upgraded Hey Tuya and Expanded AI Capabilities for Hardware Innovation, Advancing AI Home, AI Robot, and AI Energy Ecosystems
feed.summary: Tuya Smart announced an upgraded "Hey Tuya" platform and expanded AI capabilities at its 2026 Global Developer Summit, focusing on hardware innovation across AI Home, AI Robot, and AI Energy ecosystems. The updated Hey Tuya integrates with third-party services like Google Mail, supports various hardware platforms including Matter, and features advanced AI for natural conversations and task planning. Tuya also introduced new AI-native technologies like Personal Voice Activity Detection (PVAD) to enhance device accuracy and user experience, aiming to lower barriers to AI development and accelerate adoption.

feed.title: Is Qualcomm The Next AI Stock To Surge?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) has seen a significant stock decline but is poised for a re-rating due to its strong position in edge AI, a shift towards running AI directly on devices. The company's expertise in communication technology and power-efficient compute is crucial for autonomous cars, robotics, and AI-enabled devices. Despite current headwinds like Apple's modem shift, Qualcomm's financial strength, including 32% operating cash flow margins and a $20 billion share repurchase program, suggests it is undervalued and potentially the next AI stock to surge, similar to Marvell Technology's recent rise.

feed.title: Tuya Smart Unveils Upgraded Hey Tuya and Expanded AI Capabilities for Hardware Innovation, Advancing AI Home, AI Robot, and AI Energy Ecosystems
feed.summary: Tuya Smart announced an upgraded Hey Tuya voice assistant and expanded AI toolkit at its 2026 Global Developer Summit, focusing on scenario-based intelligence and integration with third-party services like Google Mail. The company also unveiled self-trained models and infrastructure updates to support AI Home, AI Robot, and AI Energy ecosystems, aiming to rebuild hardware with AI and lower development barriers for global developers. This move deepens Tuya's Physical AI strategy while past AI-related announcements have seen mixed market reactions.

feed.title: Windward Capital Management Co. CA Trims Holdings in The Walt Disney Company $DIS
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA has reduced its stake in The Walt Disney Company by 3.9%, selling 6,275 shares but still holding 154,675 shares valued at $17.597 million. Despite this trimming, Disney remains the fund's 23rd largest holding, making up about 1.4% of its investment portfolio. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings expectations with $1.63 EPS and a 5.2% revenue increase, leading analysts to maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $133.53.

feed.title: Windward Capital Management Co. CA Sells 3,637 Shares of Seagate Technology Holdings PLC $STX
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA reduced its stake in Seagate Technology Holdings PLC by 6.5% during the fourth quarter, selling 3,637 shares and leaving its total holdings at 52,255 shares valued at $14.39 million. This divestment comes as Seagate sees increasing bullish sentiment from analysts and trades near 52-week highs following strong earnings, despite significant insider selling in the past three months.

feed.title: Windward Capital Management Co. CA Has $19.31 Million Stock Position in Teradyne, Inc. $TER
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA has slightly decreased its holdings in Teradyne, Inc. by 3.3%, now owning 99,757 shares valued at $19.31 million. Despite this, Teradyne has shown strong performance, beating earnings estimates with an EPS of $1.80 and revenue of $1.08 billion, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with a target price of $314.53. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share.

feed.title: D.R. Horton, Inc. $DHI Shares Sold by Windward Capital Management Co. CA
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA reduced its stake in D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) by 3.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,603 shares while still holding 180,547 shares valued
